description:
Features:
- Keep your toothbrush safe and clean with bamboo travel case.
- Great have for travelling, home daily travel hiking camping school business trip.
- Smooth and comfortable, natural eco-friendly material,it's portable,and better for you to take for travelling.
Material: Bamboo

Size: 2.8*21cm


Package included:
1 x Toothbrush Travel Case （Not included toothbrush）

variants.name: Bamboo Toothbrush Novelty Wooden Teeth Brush soft-bristle Bamboo Fibre Wooden Handle Bamboo Tube Charcoal Set Bamboo
